records.description: WF-3565: THE STANDARD THREAD LENGTH FOR NAS6710-SERIES BOLTS IS 0.902 INCHES AND THEREFORE WILL NOT PERMIT THE FULL 0.95 INCHES THREAD ENGAGEMENT SPECIFIED IN SPY 6 ARRAY ICD 8624370 NOTE 8. NAS6710-SERIES BOLTS IDENTIFY 0.902 INCHES AS THE STANDARD THREAD LENGTH HOWEVER NOTE 5 OF THE DATA SHEET STATES THE 0.902 INCHES LENGTH IS REFERENCE ONLY AND NOT AN INSPECTION REQUIREMENT. BASED ON LESSONS LEARNED FROM THE FIRST SPY-6 ARRAY INSTALLATION AT CSEDS, THE MODIFIED THREAD LENGTHS OF 1-1/12 INCHES IS REQUIRED TO ACHIEVE PROPER THREAD ENGAGEMENT.  FY18 FIRM SHIP DDG 128 FY18 FRIM SHIP #2 DDG 129 FY19 FIRM SHIP DDG 131 FY20 FIRM SHIP DDG 133 FY20 OPTION SHIP DDG 135 FY21 FIRM SHIP DDG 137 FY22 FIRM SHIP DDG 139
